old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.4","title":"Authorize RPL control senders","description":"Resolve node-level review findings: reject foreign-instance/DODAG DIOs before neighbor-table mutation, and carry authenticated IPv6 sender identity into DAO processing so a peer cannot advertise another node's target or poison its replay state. Define the allowed target-to-sender relationship from existing IPv6/IID identity rules and fail closed before route mutation.","acceptance_criteria":"Foreign DIO scope causes no neighbor mutation; spoofed DAO targets from another authenticated sender are rejected before replay/edge/route mutation; legitimate self-target and forwarding cases are explicitly tested against protocol identity rules; RPL/node tests and Clippy pass; three reviews pass.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-17T21:47:27.211504Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T21:47:27.211504Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.4","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-17T21:47:27.331702Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
